name: Polish Pierogi
recipeIngredient: 3 Medium Potatoes, cooked, drained and mashed
recipeInstructions:
Dough: Mix flour, eggs, sour cream, salt, and warm water a little at a time. Knead dough until firm and elastic; cover and let rest 10 minutes.
Potato Filling: Prepare potatoes, set aside.
Cheese Filling: Combine cottage cheese, beaten eggs, salt, butter, and mix thoroughly.
Sauce: Saute onion in butter until golden brown.
Assembly: Divide dough into three parts. On a floured surface, roll dough to about 1/8-inch thick; cut into 3-inch rounds. Place a small spoonful of filling in the center of each round, fold and press edges firmly to seal.
Cooking: Drop pierogi into simmering chicken bouillon with 1 teaspoon oil. Do not crowd. Simmer gently for 15 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain well.
Casserole: Place drained pierogi in a casserole dish and pour sauce mixture over all. Garnish with mushrooms.
